Records.authors: Bauberger, S., Berends, Frits A., Bohm, M., Buza, M.
Records.description: Two-loop master self-energy diagram (double-triangle topology) with five massive propagators and one external momentum. UV-convergent in $D=4$. The paper notes this diagram is not of the self-energy-insertion type. No explicit analytical result derived; further studies needed.

Records.authors: Giroux, Mathieu, Pokraka, Andrzej, Porkert, Franziska, Sohnle, Yoann
Records.description: The 5-mass kite family of two-loop self-energy Feynman integrals in $d=2-2\varepsilon$ dimensions with five distinct internal masses. Contains two elliptic subsectors from $(123)$-sunrise and $(345)$-sunrise subtopologies. Authors construct epsilon-form basis via gauge transformations leveraging $\mathrm{SL}(2,\mathbb{Z})$ covariance and pull back the DE onto the moduli space of two punctured tori.

Two-loop self-energy master diagram $T_{12345}$ with five arbitrary internal masses. Imaginary part via Appell $F_1$ and Lauricella $F_D$ functions. Full integral via one-dimensional dispersion representation.

Records.authors: Martin, Stephen P., Robertson, David G.
Records.description: Two-loop master self-energy integral with five propagators (double-triangle/spectacles topology) in $d=4-2\varepsilon$. Denoted $M(x,y,z,u,v)$ in the TSIL basis. Top-level master integral in the Tarasov reduction.

Records.authors: Kniehl, Bernd A., Pikelner, Andrey F., Veretin, Oleg L.
Records.description: Generic two-loop two-point (self-energy) integral family with 5 propagators and arbitrary internal masses. Used for complete $\mathcal{O}(\alpha^2)$ electroweak threshold corrections in the SM. 7 master integrals ($A_0, B_0, I_0, S_0, T_0, U_0, V_0, M_0$ in TSIL conventions). Full analytic results through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^0)$.

Records.authors: Gracey, John A., Peláez, Marcela, Reinosa, Urko, Tissier, Matthieu
Records.description: Two-loop self-energy family for gluon/ghost propagators in Curci-Ferrari model. Each $m_i \in \{0,m\}$ gives 32 mass sectors. 31 two-loop master integrals evaluated numerically via TSIL. Includes 16 gluon and 6 ghost diagrams.

Two-loop massive kite graph (2-point) in $D=4$. Picard-Fuchs operator is $t\, d/dt + 1$ (order 1). Feynman integral satisfies inhomogeneous DE with two-loop sunset boundary terms. Also shown trivial in $D=2$ (Section 5.1.1).

Records.authors: Aleksejevs, A., Barkanova, S., Davydychev, A.I.
Records.description: Two-loop massive self-energy (kite/double-triangle) with 5 distinct internal masses. Evaluated numerically via dispersive representation of sub-loop combined with dimension-shifting recurrence relations.

Two-loop self-energy double triangle (spectacle) topology $S_1$ with 5 massive propagators. UV-finite in the Feynman parameter integral. Computed using sector decomposition with numerator insertions for the Higgs boson self-energy in the Standard Model. Called $S_1$ in the paper.

Records.authors: Barrios, Nahuel, Gracey, John A., Marcela Peláez, Reinosa, Urko
Records.description: General massive two-loop self-energy integral family for QCD propagators (gluon, ghost, quark) in the Curci-Ferrari model with mass labels from $\{0, m, M\}$. IBP-reduced via Reduze to TSIL master integrals and evaluated numerically.

Records.authors: Stephen P. Martin, David G. Robertson
Records.description: TSIL (Two-loop Self-energy Integral Library) can be obtained from https://www.niu.edu/spmartin/TSIL/ or http://faculty.otterbein.edu/DRobertson/TSIL/

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the kite with generic internal, zero external masses, computed via principal Landau determinants.

corrections.note: v1.2.3 release curation: re-keyed from non-canonical home
